fields.name: assessmentScope
fields.label: Assessment Scope
fields.description: Optional Trust Service Category to assess. Security is always in scope for SOC 2.

fields.name: auditType
fields.label: Audit Type
fields.description: Optional SOC 2 audit type to target.

output.label: Output Format
output.description: Choose the format for the generated SOC 2 readiness report.

reportDir.label: Report Directory
reportDir.description: Optional output directory for the SOC 2 assessment bundle.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while the assessment runs.
